ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of event (foreign key referencing event_types) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "speaker_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "media_youtube" TEXT /* Link to the event video on YouTube */,
  "media_soundcloud" TEXT /* Link to the event audio on SoundCloud */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., service, roundtable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_links" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the media */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Media platform (e.g., YouTube, SoundCloud) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL link to the media content */,
  "media_format" TEXT /* Format of the media (e.g., video, audio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_links_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, listen) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_events" (
  "department_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departmental event link */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event linked to a department */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_events_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Any comments provided by the user regarding the event */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related event */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, announcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the interest */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
